VAL-M1-STORAGE-001.evidence: 2 test cases passed: creates a mission and writes to filesystem; creates mission directory structure

VAL-M1-STORAGE-002.evidence: 3 test cases passed: reads a mission by ID; returns undefined for non-existent mission; returns full Mission object with all fields

VAL-M1-STORAGE-003.evidence: 3 test cases passed: persists changes to disk; updates updatedAt timestamp automatically; returns undefined for non-existent mission

VAL-M1-STORAGE-004.evidence: 3 test cases passed: returns all mission summaries; returns empty array when no missions exist; sorts by createdAt descending

VAL-M1-STORAGE-005.evidence: 2 test cases passed: removes mission directory; returns false for non-existent mission

VAL-M1-STORAGE-006.evidence: 10 test cases passed: creates feature within mission scope; reads feature by ID; updates feature; lists all features; lists by status; deletes feature; handles duplicate and non-existent cases

VAL-M1-STORAGE-007.evidence: 10 test cases passed: creates worker definition; reads worker by ID; updates worker; lists all workers; lists by capability and status; deletes worker; handles duplicate and non-existent cases

VAL-M1-STORAGE-008.evidence: 10 test cases passed: creates validation state to JSON; reads validation state; updates validation state; deletes validation state; updates individual assertion status; handles non-existent and duplicate cases
